parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: 'C0ALJCTP4MV', text: $json.notificationText, blocks: JSON.parse($json.blocks), username: 'Assistant Analytics', icon_emoji: ':bar_chart:', unfurl_links: false, unfurl_media: false }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { thisWeek: $('Fetch This Week').all().map(i => i.json), users: $('Collapse Users').first().json.users } }];
return [{ json: { lastWeek: $('Fetch Last Week').all().map(i => i.json), thisWeek: $('Collapse This Week').first().json.thisWeek, users: $('Collapse This Week').first().json.users } }];
